channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Forest bike abandoned, on corner of Winchester Road and St Marys Avenue, 13th April
item.description:
Abandoned Forest bike, on the corner of WQinchester Road and St Marys Avenue, no visible number.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Cumberland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fry Tipping furniture, 13th April
item.description:
Someone left all furniture outside property on Sunday and still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St light not working by 26 Crescent road, 13th April
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree/ bush needs purning beck, 13th April
item.description:
Hi every Spring and summer this needs reporting as it becomes over grown. It scratches card trying to park. And could harm children in pushchairs or people in wheelchairs. Can this be fixed please and maybe added to a plan/rota to keep it cut back? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip not lit up for safety at night, 13th April
item.description:
No safety lights Unsure if there is a permit as none displayed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lucknow Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal Bins for Carlton House /other buildings, 13th April
item.description:
Maybe fly tipping. A mixed of various waste items including construction material in black bags, furniture and other items left at the location where the communal Bins are placed. We are having rodent issues in our block of flats due to this regular issue. This is a regular issue and needs to be addressed by the council.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Terrace, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Whole of Oxenford, 13th April
item.description:
The whole of Oxenford Street is am ABSOLUTE DISGUSTING DISGRACE SOUTHWARK COUNCIL DO NOT CARE ABOUT OXENFORD STREET END TO ENF ON TGE STREET JUNK DUMPED

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Oxenford Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red/green man facing wrong direction, 13th April
item.description:
Corner of Greys Inn Road and A40 - pedestrian signal rotated 90 degrees

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Holborn, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Giant oil container, 13th April
item.description:
Someone’s left an oil container her

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cowper Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blanket stuck in tree, 13th April
item.description:
Hi! This tree has had a blanket stuck in it for the last month or so, the wind doesn't seem to get it unstuck. It's not a big problem, but it does look quite unsightly. It's about 2 floors up off the ground, you'd probably need a cherry picker to get it down. (Sorry for the dark picture!) Thanks, George

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elgar Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black rubbish bin with decorators waste., 13th April
item.description:
On Timber Pond Road, SE16 6AG, opposite junction with Dock Hill Avenue, SE16 6AQ a black plastic rubbish bin containing decorators waste has been fly tipped next to the council litter bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timber Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remains of damaged lamp standard, 13th April
item.description:
This lampost, by junction of Chislehurst Road and Crofton Lane, was knocked over in an accident several months ago and is still waiting replacement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside ESCP BUSINESS SCHOOL GATE, 13th April
item.description:
Illegal parking - blocking pavement and resident’s parking space.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsifal Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish being dumped, 13th April
item.description:
Furniture being dumped daily by the flats carpark been dumped 6 weeks yet residents have reported still here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maze Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa & carpet dumped on Oxenford Street, 13th April
item.description:
Sofa, carpet etc flytipped on corner of Oxenford St & Oglander Road over the weekend.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Oxenford Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car has not moved for more than 6 months, 13th April
item.description:
Dumped car has not moved for more than 6 months and is blocking my driveway. It is in the cul de sac in Swanton Road DA8 1LR

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swanton Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole very deep on Europe Road, sovereign house front car park entrance, 13th April
item.description:
The pothole has been there for at least 4 months and it is getting wider and deeper to the point of risking damage to cars as well as a severe trip hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Europe Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking illegally blocking access to two garages, 13th April
item.description:
Person has parked on double yellow line blocking access to two garages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drummond Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside my house is clearly blocked, 13th April
item.description:
Please come and clean the drain out as soon as possible . Outside 33 Selsey Crescent Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selsey Crescent, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned near marked tree/ground work, 13th April
item.description:
Car has been here for 7 weeks outside maisonettes on westmount road where a lot of residents have very young children/ mobility issues and need their car close to home. it's a nuisance crossing the road as it's busy with children.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
